# Learnings

Durable corrections the agent must follow. Appended by `/sdlc:learn` when the
user corrects the agent; inherited by every agent (including the parallel
workers, inside their worktrees). Keep entries behavioural and high-signal —
prune duplicates over time.

## Learnings

<!-- e.g. - (2026-06-05) Never commit generated files; add them to .gitignore. -->
- (2026-06-05) Keep all bash scripts compatible with bash 3.2 (macOS /bin/bash): no mapfile/readarray, no associative arrays.
